name: Suspicious Service Execution
description: Detects services.exe spawning suspicious child processes indicative of service-based execution
query:
// Detect suspicious processes spawned by service control manager
// Trigger on services.exe spawning scripting engines or suspicious binaries
events from edr_process
where parent_exe matches "(?i)services\.exe$"
  and exe_path matches "(?i)(cmd\.exe|powershell|mshta|wscript|cscript|rundll32|regsvr32)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
